title: Ambrose University - Canada.ca
content:
You’re eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Arts (3-year, in Behavioural Science, Business Administration, Christian Studies, English Literature, General Studies History, Music)
- Bachelor of Arts (4-year, in Behavioural Science, Christian Studies, English Literature, General Studies History, Music)
- Bachelor of Business Administration
- Bachelor of Education (after degree)
- Bachelor of Arts in Psychology (4-year Major)
- Bachelor of Theology
- Master of Theological Studies
- Master in Intercultural Ministries
- Master in Leadership and Ministry
- Master of Christian Studies
You’re not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
